description: Submit handler fetches a POST route that doesn't exist; Export button has no handler. Level 3.5 must FAIL both, pass the GET chain and the navigation anchor, and report the declared sparkle placeholder as INFO.
notes: Two dead interactions expected (submit -> absent POST, #export no handler). GET /api/feedback has 2 callers so no UNCALLED-ROUTE. Back-to-top anchor and declared sparkle placeholder must not fail.
